description: A graduate student imported a batch of references, and Zotero defaulted everything to 'Journal Article'. You need to fix four specific items that are incorrectly categorized. Change the Item Type for 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al.), 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al.), and 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks' (Krizhevsky et al.) to 'Conference Paper'. Change the Item Type for 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Shannon) to 'Book'. Do not change the item type of any other papers.

targets.title_fragment: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
